g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are all the fields in OutputModeConfig and what do they control?')
sendPrompt('What does the thesis mode config look like specifically? Show the structure_template and section_prompts')
sendPrompt('What does the research article mode config look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the blog / newsletter mode config look like?')

sendPrompt('What does the business report mode config look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the shared writing pipeline do that is the same across all modes?')
g.text: Outline gen → section draft → eval-optimizer → format render

svg.text: Same pipeline — different config. Add a new mode by adding one config dict.
